description: Focus on two areas of Korean language learning (listening  speaking) so that students can understand and express themselves in contemporary Korean. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 345 prior to Summer 2019.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 106(or E ASIAN 106 prior to Summer 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 205

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 106(or E ASIAN 106 prior to Summer 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 205
